zh.lifeSummary: 當Philip Darcy於1352年5月21日出生在英國林可爾史爾時，他的父親John Darcy30歲，母親Elizabeth Meinill20歲。他和Elizabeth Grey至少有3個兒子和4個女兒。他去世於1399年4月24日在英國諾圖波藍德林加姆享年46歲，埋葬在英國林可爾史爾可乃斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Philip Darcy于1352年5月21日出生在英国林可爾史爾时，他的父亲John Darcy30岁，母亲Elizabeth Meinill20岁。他和Elizabeth Grey至少有3个儿子和4个女儿。他去世于1399年4月24日在英国諾圖波藍德林加姆享年46岁，埋葬在英国林可爾史爾可乃斯。

nameMeanings.name: Darcy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Eamon, Brendan, Eamonn, Maeve, Malachy, Niamh, Seamus.  French Gisele, Julien, Normand, Alain, Armand, Cecile, Clemence, Dominique, Emile, Gilles, Jean-Paul, Laure.
English (Lancashire) and Irish: of Norman origin, a habitational name from Arcy in Manche, France, with fused preposition d(e) ‘from’.

Irish: in Ireland, this is generally the Norman name (see 1 above), established in Meath by Sir William D'Arcy in the 1360s, but it was also adopted for Ó Dorchaidhe ‘descendant of the dark one’, from dorcha ‘dark, gloomy’, a Connacht name that fell together with the Norman surname, which was introduced by Sir William D'Arcy and Sir John D'Arcy, Chief Justiciar of Ireland in the 14th century.

variants.name: Darcey
meanings: English (of Norman origin) and Irish (Tipperary): variant of   Darcy  .

nameMeanings.name: Philip
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Greek name Philippos, meaning ‘lover of horses’, from philein ‘to love’ + hippos ‘horse’. This was popular in the classical period and since. It was the name of the father of Alexander the Great . It was also the name of one of Christ's apostles, of a deacon ordained by the apostles after the death of Christ, and of several other early saints. See also Philippa .

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Philip Darcy was born on 21 May 1352, in Lincolnshire, England, his father, John Darcy, was 30 and his mother, Elizabeth Meinill, was 20. He had at least 3 sons and 4 daughters with Elizabeth Grey. He died on 24 April 1399, in Chillingham, Northumberland, England, at the age of 46, and was buried in Knaith, Lincolnshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Philip Darcy est né le 21 mai 1352, à Lincolnshire, Angleterre, son père, John Darcy, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Meinill, avait 20 ans. Il a eu au moins 3 fils et 4 filles avec Elizabeth Grey. Il est décédé le 24 avril 1399, à Chillingham, Northumberland, Angleterre, à l’âge de 46 ans, et a été enterré à Knaith, Lincolnshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Philip Darcy am 21. Mai 1352 in Lincolnshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Darcy 30 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Meinill 20. Er hatte mit Elizabeth Grey mindestens 3 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 24. April 1399 im Alter von 46 Jahren in Chillingham, Northumberland, England und wurde in Knaith, Lincolnshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Philip Darcy è nato il il 21 maggio 1352 nel Lincolnshire, England, il suo padre, John Darcy, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Meinill, aveva 20 anni. Lui avuto almeno 3 figli e 4 figlie con Elizabeth Grey. Morì il 24 aprile 1399, nel Chillingham, Northumberland, England, all'età di 46 anni, e fu sepolto a Knaith, Lincolnshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Philip Darcyが1352年5月21日にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアで生まれた時，父John Darcyは30歳，母Elizabeth Meinillは20歳であった。彼はElizabeth Greyとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と4人の娘をもうけた。彼は1399年4月24日にイギリスノースウンバーランドチリンガムで46歳で死去し，イギリスリンコルンシュアイアナイスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Philip Darcy(이)가 1352년 5월 21일 영국 링코실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Darcy(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Meinill(은)는 20세였다. 그는 Elizabeth Grey(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1399년 4월 24일 영국 노르스벌랜드 치링함에서 46세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 링코실르 나이스에 묻혔다.

mn.21 May 1352–24 April 1399: 1352 оны Тавдугаар сарын 21–1399 оны Дөрөвдүгээр сарын 24
mn.Cleveland, Yorkshire, England: Cleveland, Eoferwic, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.21 May 1352–24 April 1399: 21 de maio de 1352–24 de abril de 1399
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Philip Darcy nasceu em 21 de maio de 1352, em Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Darcy, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Meinill, tinha 20 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 4 filhas com Elizabeth Grey. Ele faleceu em 24 de abril de 1399, em Chillingham, Northumberland, Inglaterra, com 46 anos, e foi sepultado em Knaith, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Philip Darcy родился 21 мая 1352 г. в местности линколншир, Англия, его отцу по имени John Darcy было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Meinill, 20. У него было по крайней мере 3 сына и 4 дочери от Elizabeth Grey. Он умер 24 апреля 1399 г. в местности чиллингхам, нортумбирланд, Англия в возрасте 46 лет и был похоронен в местности неит, линколншир, Англия.

es.21 May 1352–24 April 1399: 21 de mayo de 1352–24 de abril de 1399
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Philip Darcy nació el 21 de mayo de 1352, en Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, su papá, John Darcy, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Meinill, tenía 20 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos y 4 hijas con Elizabeth Grey. Murió el 24 de abril de 1399, en Chillingham, Northumberland, Inglaterra, a la edad de 46 años, y fue sepultado en Knaith, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra.
